landingPages.title: McCormick Spice Rack
landingPages.summary: Enter for your chance to win a brand new McCormick Spice Rack. McCormick Organic Spice Rack features 24 of our highest quality organic herbs and spices.

footer.title: MCCORMICK SPICE RACK
footer.text: Enter for your chance to win a brand new McCormick Spice Rack. McCormick Organic Spice Rack features 24 of our highest quality organic herbs and spices. This kitchen must-have can be a countertop spice rack or wall mounted to the wall (requires 2 screws). Our spice rack with spices included offers unbeatable value vs buying individual spices.

features: McCormick Gourmet Three Tier Wood 24 Piece Spice Rack, 27.6 oz Box
CLASSIC DESIGN: With three tiers to hold 24 spice jars, this aesthetically pleasing wooden spice rack helps ensure you always have delicious, inspiring flavor within convenient reach.
24 ORGANIC HERBS & SPICES: Elevate your cooking and meals with 24 organic McCormick Gourmet herbs, spices and seasonings including classics like Organic Basil, Organic Saigon Cinnamon, and more.
WALL MOUNTED: Sturdy design can be wall mounted with two screws (not included) or setup on your countertop.
GIFTABLE: This classic wooden spice rack is a thoughtful gift for any flavor-lover in your life, and makes a great housewarming, wedding, or bridal shower gift, too.
FLAVORSEALED: Bottle is created with a FlavorSealed design for long lasting fresh flavor.
DIMENSIONS: Vertical, space-saving, 3-tiered rack measurements: Width: 16.125 inch, Depth: 2.5625 inch, Height: 18.75 inch.
For tips on how to prepare this product, please reference label instructions.
This product is in a Cardboard Box.

features: FRESH AND SECURE : Airtight, moisture proof and insect proof to protect food. Retains crunch of crunchy foods and softness of soft foods.
